name: litterbox
title: Litterbox
description: Upload files to Litterbox from Raycast with a file picker, set expiry (1h, 12h, 24h, or 72h), and get shareable links. Recent uploads are listed until they expire.
author: 0xdhrv

commands.name: upload-to-litterbox
commands.title: Upload to Litterbox
commands.description: Upload files to Litterbox with 1h, 12h, 24h, or 72h expiry using the file picker; the shareable URL is copied to the clipboard.

commands.name: recent-uploads
commands.title: View Recent Uploads
commands.subtitle: Litterbox
commands.description: View recent Litterbox uploads with copy-URL and open-in-browser actions. Entries are shown until they expire (1h–72h depending on upload).

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
